titles.title: We Have Come into His House (3)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We have come into His house Gathered in His Name to worship Him, We have come into His house Gathered in His Name to worship Him, We have come into His house Gathered in His Name to worship Christ the Lord; Worship Him, Christ, the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just forget about yourself, Concentrate on Him and worship Him; Just forget about yourself, Concentrate on Him, and worship Him; Just forget about yourself, Concentrate on Him, and worship Christ the Lord Worship Him, Christ, the Lord.

verse.name: v3
